pageContext.name: Black Templars Outriders Brother Valtus
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Black Templars Outriders Brother Valtus 1:18 Scale Collectible Figure!  Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators. This Brother Valtus figure stands at 5.35' tall includes interchangable hands and weapon accessories.   Don't miss your chance to add him to your Warhammer 40k collection today!
